plugins.name: Sample Plugin
plugins.description: An example plugin that adds a map control and demonstrates the plugin UI surface APIs: a shared-rail right-sidebar panel (dock: replace-style, sharing the Style rail), a top toolbar menu, and a floating panel. Use it as a template for marketplace entries.
plugins.author: GeoLibre

plugins.name: NetCDF Loader
plugins.description: Load NetCDF4/HDF5 climate grids into GeoLibre as color-mapped raster layers with date-based time controls, colormaps, and pixel value inspection.
plugins.author: Husayn El Sharif

plugins.name: NASA OPERA
plugins.description: Search, visualize, and analyze NASA OPERA products with GeoAgent-assisted CMR search, titiler-cmr raster display, change detection, time-series statistics, report export, pixel inspection, AOI statistics, and granule downloads. No Earthdata login needed for search or display.
plugins.author: Qiusheng Wu

plugins.name: Data to Science (D2S)
plugins.description: Browse and view Data to Science (D2S) projects, flights, and data products. Add raster data products as titiler tiles and project vector layers (FlatGeobuf) to the map, with automatic zoom to added layers.
plugins.author: Qiusheng Wu

plugins.name: HyperCoast
plugins.description: Visualize and analyze hyperspectral imagery (EMIT, PACE, NEON, PRISMA, Tanager, AVIRIS, DESIS, EnMAP, Wyvern). Load a scene, build a wavelength-based RGB composite with adjustable bands and reflectance stretch, click pixels to plot reflectance spectra, and export the collected spectra to CSV. The control follows the host app's light/dark theme.
plugins.author: Qiusheng Wu

plugins.name: Vantor Open Data
plugins.description: Search, visualize, and download satellite imagery from the Vantor Open Data STAC catalog. Browse disaster event collections, filter by phase and map extent, view pre/post footprints, render Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs on the map, and download selected scenes.
plugins.author: Qiusheng Wu

plugins.name: Flowmaps.gl
plugins.description: A plugin for visualizing origin-destination data using flowmap.gl.
plugins.author: Kai Erlenbusch
